verses.text: Jerikho khua-ah Jesuh lut a, a paisuak dingin khuasung a nawk laitakin
Zakkhias a kici siahdong ukpa khat na om a, amah mihau khat ahi hi
Amah in Jesuh kua hiam cih a muhna dingin hanciam hi; ahi zongin amah mi tuntom khat ahih manin mihon lakah a mu zo kei hi
Tua ahih manin amah na matai a, Jesuh a muhtheihna dingin a totna ding lampi gei-a theithek kung tungah a na kah hi
Jesuh, tua mun a tun' ciangin khuadak to-in ama kiangah, “Zakkhias aw, manlangin hong kumsuk in. Na inn-ah tuzan kong taam ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih manin Zakkhias zong hong kum mengmeng a, lungdam mahmahin a inn-ah Jesuh a tungsak hi
Hih thu a thei mi khempeuh phun uh a, “Mimawhpa' inn-ah a giak dingin Jesuh a pai hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Zakkhias dingin Topa kiangah, “Topa aw, ka neihsa a kimkhat mizawngte tungah ka pia ding hi. Mi khatpeuh khemin a na ka laksak leh a zah li-in ka lohkik ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Tuni-in hih innkuan in hotkhiatna a ngah hi. Hih mipa pen Abraham' suante khat zong hi lai hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a mangthangte a zong ding leh a honkhia dingin Mihing Tapa a hong pai ahi hi,” a ci hi.

Jesuh pen Jerusalem khua a tung dektak hi a, Pasian' Ukna hun hong tung kuanta ding hi, ci-in mite in zong ngaihsun uh ahih manin, mite in ama thugen a na ngaih laitakun Jesuh in amaute kiangah thugentehna khat genthuah lai a
“Khatvei, ulian khat om a, kumpi za a lakkhit ciangin a ciahkik dingin gamlapi gamah a pai dingin a dingkhia hi
A din'khiat ma-in ama nasem mihing sawmte sam a, amaute tungah sum za khat ciat pia-in, ‘Ka omloh sungin hih sumte tawh na siam bang bangun sum na bawl ciat un,’ ci-in a vaikhak hi
Ahi zongin ama gammite in hih ulianpa mudah uh ahih manin ama nungah kamtai sawl uh a, ‘Ka kumpi dingun nang kong deih kei uh hi,’ cisak uh hi
“Ahi zongin hih ulianpa kumpi za ngahsa-in hong tun'kik ciangin, sum a ap a nasemte in bangzah ciat a na meetsak uh hiam ci-in a theihna dingin a kiangah a nasemte hong paina dingun thu a pia hi
A nasem khat hong pai masa a, ‘Topa aw, nong sum piak za khat tawh tul khat ka meetsak hi,’ hong ci hi
Amah in, ‘Hoih mahmah hi; nang pen nasem gina na hi hi. Thuneu-ah citak na hih manin khuapi sawm na uk ding hi,’ a ci hi
Tua ciangin a nasem nihnapa hong pai a, ‘Topa aw, nong sum piak za khat tawh za nga ka meetsak hi,’ hong ci hi
Amah in, ‘Khuapi nga na uk ding hi,’ a ci hi
Tua ciangin a nasem dang khat hong pai a, ‘Topa aw, hih lai-ah na sum za khat om hi. Mainul khat tawh tunin ka selcip hi
Nang pen mi sit hak khat na hih manin kong kihta hi. Sum lam lopi-in sum deihpa na hi a, lokho lopi-in an la nuampa na hi hi,’ a hong ci hi
A topa in ama kiangah, ‘Nasem ginalopa aw, nangma kampau mah tawh nang na kiman hi. Sum lam lopi-in sum ka deihlam, lokho lopi-in an la nuamin, mi sit hak ka hihlam nong thei hi
Tua bangin hong thei na hih leh bang hangin sumkholna-ah ka sumte na koihlo na hi hiam? Na koih hi lecin, kong tun'kik ciangin a pi leh a meet kigawm ka ngahkik ding hi,’ a ci hi
Tua ciangin a kiangah a ding a nasemte kiangah, ‘Ama tung panin a sum za khat la un la, sum tul khat a nei nasempa tungah pia un,’ a ci hi
Amaute in a topa kiangah, ‘Topa aw, amah in sum tul khat neikhin hilo ahi hiam?’ a ci uh hi
A topa in, ‘Ke'n kong cihin-ah, a neisate tungah kipiathuah ding a, ahi zongin a neilote tung panin themkhat a neihsun nangawn kilaksak ding hi
Tu-in, kumpi dingin kei a hong deihlo ka galte pen hih lai-ah hong paipih un la, keima muhna-ah that un,’ ci hi,” a ci hi.
Jesuh in hih thuteng a genkhit ciangin amah masa-in Jerusalem khua manawhin a paisuak hi
Oliv Mual tunga a om Bethfage leh Bethany khuanai a tun' ciangin a nungzuite nih masawlin
amaute kiangah, “Mai-a om khua-ah va pai un. A khuasung na lut uh ciangin kuamah a tuan' ngei nailohna lano khat khau a kikhih na mu ding uh hi. A khau sut un la, hih lai-ah hong kai un
Mi khatpeuh in, ‘Bang hangin sut na hi uh hiam?’ hong cih leh, ‘Topa in deih hi,’ ci-in dawng un,” ci-in a vaikhak hi
Amaute gel zong paipah uh a, Jesuh' gen bang teekteek mahin a na om hi
A la khau a sut laitakun la neite in, “Bang hangin sut na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin
“Topa in deih hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi
Amaute in Jesuh kiangah a la paipih uh a, a lano tungah a puan uh phahin Jesuh a tuangsak uh hi
La tungah tuangin Jesuh a pai laitakin a lampi tungah mite in a puante uh na phah uh hi

Jerusalem khua a tun'kuan, Oliv Mual-a lam suktuah a kipatna panin Jesuh' nung a zui mihonpite khempeuh in amau muhsa na lamdang liante hangin, nakpi takin a gingin Pasian' tungah lungdamna ko-in amah phatding kipan uh a
“Pasian in Topa' tangin a hong pai kumpipa, thupha pia ta hen. Vantungah nopna om hen la, Pasian' min thang ta hen,” ci-in a awng uh hi
Tua ciangin mihon lak panin Farisi mi pawlkhat in Jesuh kiangah, “Sia aw, hih bangin a awng na nung hong zuite kham in,” a cih ciangin
Jesuh in, “Ke'n kong cihin-ah, hih mite in hong phatloin khawl ta le uh zong, hih lamdunga suangte in phatin awng veve ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.
Jerusalem khua hong nai semsem a, a khuapi a muh ciangin Jesuh in tamlawh a
“Nopsak tawntung theihna ding bang kisam hiam, ci-in tuni-in thei lecin ut mahmah ing. Ahi zongin nang na theithei kei hi
Na kimkotah na galte in a pan'mun ding uh hong to-in, hong umcihin hong nehcih hun hong tung ding hi

Nang leh na kulh sunga om mi khempeuh hong sumai ding uh a, a omna ngei munah suang khat zong om nawnlo ding hi. Hih bang a pian'na pen nang a hu dingin Pasian hong pailam na phawklohna hang ahi hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin biakinn sungah Jesuh lutin a sunga om sumbukte hawlkhiat ding kipan a
“‘Ka inn pen thungetna inn kici ding hi,’ ci-in Pasian in a genna thu Lai Siangtho sungah kigelh hi. Ahi zongin note in gutate' bukna phualpi na suaksak uh hi,” ci-in amaute kiangah a gen hi
Jesuh in nisimin biakinn sungah thu a hilh hi. Siampi liante, Thukham hilh siate, leh upate in amah thatnuam uh hi
ahi zongin mi khempeuh in a thugente mal khat zong khahsuah nuamloin a thu ngai tawntung uh ahih manin a suktheihna ding uh a hun om theilo hi.
